backend.title: Backend Documentation
backend.subtitle: Task Manager — FastAPI Serverless Application
backend.overview: A serverless application built with FastAPI, deployed on AWS Lambda via Docker container images. Uses Mangum to deploy as serverless, Amazon DynamoDB for persistent data storage, and Redis (via AWS ElastiCache) for caching.

directories.description: FastAPI routers for Auth, Tasks, and Admin
Environment variables loader, database client, and Redis client setup
Core business logic — AuthService, TaskService, and AdminService
Application entrypoint and Mangum Lambda handler
AWS infrastructure provisioning — VPC, ECR, API Gateway, DynamoDB, ElastiCache, IAM, Lambda

databaseSchema.partitionKey: user_id (String — VAH... prefix and auto-increment sequence)

authFlow.title: Registration
authFlow.description: POST /api/v1/auth/register — Generates unique 'VAH' user_id, encrypts password using custom crypto logic, stored with default 'user' role and 'active' status in DynamoDB Users Table.

authFlow.title: Login
authFlow.description: POST /api/v1/auth/login — Queries DynamoDB using email-index GSI, validates decrypted password, returns signed JWT via 'Bearer' token on success.

authFlow.title: Protected Routes
authFlow.description: get_current_user_id middleware intercepts requests, extracts Bearer token from header, validates it using JWT secret, and injects user_id.

cachingStrategy.invalidation: Aggressively invalidated strictly upon task creation, update, or deletion operations
cachingStrategy.fallback: Redis connection issues immediately flag 'redis_disabled=True' globally to prevent continuous request latency; Redis is bypassed locally when ENVIRONMENT='development'.

routes.description: Login and retrieve authentication JWT token
Get current authenticated user info and detailed task statistics
routes.response: task_data (counts per status) and user_data objects

routes.description: Fetch all tasks for the logged in user (Cached heavily using Redis)
routes.response: List Array containing full task items

routes.description: List all registered users (Strictly admin role required)
routes.response: Array of user objects containing system info

envVariables.name: AWS_REGION
envVariables.description: AWS region location for resources (e.g. DynamoDB)

envVariables.name: JWT_SECRET
envVariables.description: Secret salt encryption key for signing secure JWT tokens

envVariables.name: PASS_SECRET_KEY
envVariables.description: Crypto secret used to encrypt/decrypt strings (passwords)

envVariables.name: REDIS_PORT
envVariables.description: Port connection index for ElastiCache instance

envVariables.name: ENVIRONMENT
envVariables.description: System execution state context (Used frequently to flag DEV Redis interactions to avoid excessive timeout latency)

localSetup.description: Establish and link local virtual environment dependencies

localSetup.command: Copy settings locally into isolated '.env' reference
localSetup.description: Initialize default parameters (Mandatory: ENVIRONMENT='development' to locally circumvent timeout latency defaults via AWS Redis routing attempts)
Serve and execute application via ASGI Uvicorn.

deployment.description: Configure local credentials profile for AWS console targeting via CLI

Navigate workspace into 'terraform/' initializing workspace via 'terraform init' applying current 'main' module specifications representing VPC routing layers, App Gateway instances, IAM credential specifications, and Database instance formations.
Execute Docker compilation parameters to encapsulate logic matching specific Lambda AWS Python images and stream output instances directly towards respective dedicated ECR hosting registry endpoints.
Automate/Assign relevant new deployment hashes pointing newly active runtime handlers directly toward matching ECR targets containing the built source content payload.

infrastructure: VPC combined utilizing subnets scaling across networking tiers.
ECR repositories containing actively handled application logic versions built over python:3.10 lambda base structures.
API Gateway executing requests over standard HTTP routing.
AWS Lambda acting uniquely configured with Mangum integrations.
DynamoDB databases persisting elements incorporating diverse indexed global associations strategies.
ElastiCache defining managed integrated memory access.
IAM permissions managing deep functional interactions exclusively defining logic boundaries securely.
